title: 上海端午三日旅行手帐
description: Demo project for East Asian sticker-style travel scrapbook authoring.
styleBible: 东亚粘贴式旅行手帐 + 小漫画日记；三日横向分栏；白边照片贴纸、手写中文、票根卡片、对话气泡、角色一致。

characters.name: boy traveler
characters.identity: round glasses, short black hair, cheerful travel outfit

characters.name: girl traveler
characters.identity: round glasses, long black hair, light outfit
characters.role: memory narrator and mood note keeper

materials.label: Generated Shanghai three-day scrapbook
materials.note: Use as baseline composition and style reference.

objects.content: city park anniversary night lights and fireworks badge
objects.editableRule: Replace with real night-scene image; preserve blue-gold celebration role.
Regenerate as a mini-comic panel without changing Day 1 title.

objects.content: DAY 1 6.19 端午节 城市乐园夜游 周年庆!
objects.editableRule: Use exact text overlay if generated text is distorted.
Replace with actual bar photo; keep amber atmosphere.

objects.content: movie card for 给阿姨的情书
objects.editableRule: Control poster and ticket text separately if text accuracy matters.
Treat as exact user writing unless asked to polish.
Replace with real exterior photo; keep architecture as anchor.
Replace only phone-screen/artifact image if requested.
Preserve character pose relationship; revise expressions only.
